tools.name: Stealbit
tools.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 affiliates use Stealbit, a custom exfiltration tool used previously with LockBit 2.0 [TA0010];

tools.name: rclone
tools.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 actors use (1) rclone, an open source command line cloud storage manager to exfiltrate and (2) MEGA, a publicly available file sharing service for data exfiltration.

tools.name: MEGA
tools.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 actors use (1) rclone, an open source command line cloud storage manager to exfiltrate and (2) MEGA, a publicly available file sharing service for data exfiltration.

tools.name: Plink
tools.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 uses Plink to automate SSH actions on Windows.

cves.evidence_snippet: LockBit 3.0 will only decrypt the main component or continue to decrypt and/or decompress data if the correct password is entered.
LockBit 3.0 uses Microsoft Sysinternals ProDump to dump the contents of LSASS.exe.
